description: The main objective of this pipeline is to apply a Gaussian blur operation and then extract orientation-related features. The pipeline starts with the node '32cc7528-583a-4b89-bc99-ba1fe3580a1b' and ends with the node '9d5ad965-d63c-47bf-b890-61c50c4eb98f'. It takes the input image, applies a median filter using '32cc7528-583a-4b89-bc99-ba1fe3580a1b', and then applies the Gaussian blur operation.

32cc7528-583a-4b89-bc99-ba1fe3580a1b.name: ij1-blur-median2d
32cc7528-583a-4b89-bc99-ba1fe3580a1b.description: Applies a median filter. If a multi-channel image is provided, the operation is applied to each channel. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

9d5ad965-d63c-47bf-b890-61c50c4eb98f.name: ij1-blur-gaussian2d
9d5ad965-d63c-47bf-b890-61c50c4eb98f.description: Applies convolution with a Gaussian function for smoothing. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.
